subcodes.first_line: Ó meu Senhor Soberano! Eu sou apenas uma vassala Tua, e Tu, em verdade, és o Rei dos reis.
subcodes.notes: Theory: BH prayer -- "O my Sovereign Lord! I am only a handmaid of Thine and Thou art the King of kings. I raised my hands in supplication to the heaven of Thy grace..." Bondmaid/handmaid prayer. Not found in inventory.
